title: clinopodium nepeta
intro: Clinopodium nepeta, also known as catmint or nepeta, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as nepetalactone, a natural insect repellent. Clinopodium nepeta has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its calming and sedative effects. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium nepeta include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
